case_title: LEWELLEN, NANCY YUDELSON DBA CA STATE FINANCIAL VS IKEDA, GEORGE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY LEWELLEN, NANCY YUDELSON DBA CA STATE FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT IKEDA, GEORGE IKEDA, MIYAKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO GEORGE IKEDA, RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWELLEN, NANCY YUDELSON DBA CA STATE FINANCIAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IKEDA, GEORGE IKEDA, MIYAKO $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $670.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IKEDA, GEORGE
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY MR.GEORGE IKEDA.PRINTER NOT WORKING.COPY AND RECEIPT GIVEN TO MR.IKEDA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23242, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWELLEN, NANCY YUDELSON DBA CA STATE FINANCIAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IKEDA, GEORGE PLTFF. TO PAY DEFEND. $68.00 COST. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23242 ON 8-16-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
